commit.message:
fix: add PT15M timeout to Execute_Agent_and_wait action

The Do_until loop timeout (PT30M) only prevents new iterations —
it cannot interrupt a running action. When MCP servers hang, the
agent call runs indefinitely (observed 3h+ runs).

Action-level timeout forces the call to fail after 15 minutes,
triggering RetryCount increment and loop exit condition check.

Worst case: 3 retries × 15 min = 45 min (vs unbounded before).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: only disable tools for clarifier, keep tools for analyzer/writer

The clarifier is chat-only and was timing out because the agent tried
to invoke built-in tools instead of just responding. Restrict tools
only for the clarifier session via disableTools option.

Analyzer and writer retain full tool access so they can browse the web,
fetch additional content, etc.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: disable built-in tools and increase sendAndWait timeouts

The SDK enables all built-in CLI tools by default (--allow-all), causing
the agent to invoke filesystem/web tools instead of just returning text.
This prevented session.idle from firing within the 60s default timeout.

- Set availableTools: [] on all agent sessions to restrict them to
  text-only responses
- Increase sendAndWait timeouts: 120s (clarifier, analyzer), 300s (writer)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: replace openai SDK with @github/copilot-sdk

Replace the openai npm package with @github/copilot-sdk as the core
AI engine for all agent interactions.

Changes:
- config.js: CopilotClient singleton with lazy init, BYOK provider
  support (OpenAI, Ollama, Anthropic), createAgentSession() helper
- clarifier.js: persistent SDK session per user session with
  sendAndWait() for multi-turn conversation
- analyzer.js: ephemeral SDK session with sendAndWait() for
  structured JSON analysis
- writer.js: ephemeral SDK session with streaming via
  assistant.message_delta events
- api.js: SDK session lifecycle (create on clarify/start, reuse for
  messages, disconnect on delete/expire)
- server.js: CopilotClient start on boot, graceful shutdown on
  SIGTERM/SIGINT
- .env.example: updated for Copilot SDK auth and BYOK config
- README.md: updated to reflect Copilot SDK architecture

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: ai-business-exchange
repository.description: Open B2B exchange platform: self-service partner portal, AI schema mapping, and agent-to-agent negotiation via Google A2A and Anthropic MCP

commit.message:
feat: add A2A/MCP agent-to-agent integration layer

Adds a fully autonomous agent negotiation capability alongside the
existing partner portal. Existing partners and workflows are unchanged.

## New packages
- packages/a2a-sdk — shared TypeScript types for the Google A2A protocol
  (AgentCard, Task, TaskState, Message, Part) and Anthropic MCP protocol
  (JSON-RPC 2.0, MCPTool, MCPRequest)

## New service: apps/exchange-agent (port 3008)
- GET  /.well-known/agent.json  — public Agent Card (skills, auth, endpoint)
- POST /a2a/tasks               — create a negotiation task (API key auth)
- GET  /a2a/tasks/:id           — poll task status
- POST /a2a/tasks/:id/send      — continue a multi-turn negotiation
- GET  /a2a/sessions            — list sessions for portal UI (JWT auth)
- POST /mcp                     — MCP JSON-RPC server (6 tools)

Negotiation engine drives a state machine:
  DISCOVERY → SCHEMA_SUBMITTED → MAPPING_PROPOSED → TERMS_NEGOTIATED
  → PROVISIONING → ACTIVE (or FAILED / ABANDONED)

Falls back gracefully when no platform LLM is configured.

## Database
- Migration 007_agent_sessions.sql — agent_sessions table with JSONB
  negotiation context, 9-state CHECK constraint, partner fields

## Gateway changes (additive only)
- Proxy /.well-known, /a2a, /mcp to exchange-agent
- /a2a/sessions uses JWT middleware (portal path)
- /api/auth/keys uses JWT middleware (API key management)

## Partner portal additions
- A2A Sessions page — expandable transcript, state badges, pagination
- Settings page — API Keys card (generate, list, revoke; key shown once)
- Sidebar — A2A Sessions nav item for both partner and admin roles

## Auth service
- GET /api/auth/keys — list keys endpoint (was missing)
- issueApiKey now returns keyId alongside the key value

## Infrastructure
- docker-compose: all ports use native mapping (3000:3000 etc.) —
  no more 11xxx offsets; dev and Docker now use identical URLs
- apps/exchange-agent/fly.toml — Fly.io deployment config
- apps/gateway/fly.toml — EXCHANGE_AGENT_URL added for Fly routing
- All service .env files updated to DATABASE_URL on port 5432

## Documentation
- README: 6 Mermaid architecture diagrams, A2A integration section,
  partner integration paths, testing guide, updated services table
- DEMO_GUIDE: Step 0 A2A walkthrough, $GW/$PORTAL env vars

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Show full history dropdown on empty input for login fields

Adds showAllOnEmpty prop to AutocompleteInput (default false, fully
backwards-compatible). When true, the dropdown opens with all suggestions
even when the input is empty — useful for fields pre-populated from
history where filtering to the persisted value hides other options.

Applied to Server and Database fields on ConnectionDialog only.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Clamp traversal/display depth when slider maximum is reduced

When maxTraversalAndDisplayDepth is saved, atomically clamp the
persisted traversalDepth in the same settingsStore.update() call.
A useRef-guarded useEffect in AppShell clamps local displayDepth and
traversalDepth state immediately so sliders snap visually on change.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add 'Back to Login' button to sidebar bottom

Wires to existing DISCONNECT IPC channel. Clears all session state
(graph records, schema, search history) and returns to ConnectionDialog.
Button is pinned to the sidebar bottom above the Defaults Folder section.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: drag from inside modal to overlay no longer dismisses dialog

Introduces a shared ModalOverlay component that centralises the
modal-overlay backdrop and a drag-safe close pattern. The overlay only
fires onClose when both mousedown and click originated on the overlay
itself, so text-selection drags that overshoot the dialog boundary are
ignored. All four existing modals (TraversalSettings, SearchPopup,
RecordPicker, VisibilitySettings) are refactored to use ModalOverlay.
Any future modal using ModalOverlay with onClose gets this behaviour
automatically.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: proportional hint input widths when sidebar is expanded

Wraps each AutocompleteInput in a flex container whose flex-grow is
proportional to the number of characters typed. With nothing typed both
inputs share space equally (flex 1:1). As the user types a long table
name or column name the inputs expand proportionally, so e.g. typing
'GteBooking' (10) and 'GBK_ReferenceNumber' (19) gives roughly a 10:19
width split, reducing wasted space.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: stop previous traversal before clearing store on re-search

Prevents stale RECORDS_ADDED IPC events from bleeding into a fresh search.
TraversalService.stop() now awaits the runLoop promise, guaranteeing no
further onDepthComplete callbacks fire after stop() resolves. App.tsx
invokes stop-traversal before recordStore.clear() on every new search.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: aml-sar-ai-system2
repository.description: AI-powered system that analyses suspicious financial alerts and automatically generates Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) using RAG and LLMs.

commit.message:
Phase 2: Add rules engine enhancements, ORM models, config, tests, and deployment files

- Enhance src/rules.py:
  - Add confidence_score (float, default 0.5) and recommendation (str, default '')
    fields to RuleResult dataclass
  - Update all 17 existing rules with appropriate confidence scores and actionable
    recommendations
  - Fix RULE-015 (TMS alert) to be informational-only (triggered=False) since
    TMS origin alone is not a standalone suspicious indicator
  - Add RULE-018 rule_layering_chains: 3+ distinct countries in transactions
  - Add RULE-019 rule_trade_based_laundering: max/min amount ratio > 10x + intl
  - Add RULE-020 rule_dormant_account_activity: >180 days inactivity + high volume
  - Add RULE-021 rule_rapid_account_turnover: account_age_days < 90 + high volume
  - Add RULE-022 rule_shell_entity_indicators: shell/holding/nominee business types
  - Add RULE-023 rule_beneficial_owner_mismatch: ubo_mismatch flag
  - Add RULE-024 rule_cross_border_frequency: >5 international transfers
  - Add AMLRuleEngine class with run_all_rules, get_triggered_rules,
    calculate_overall_risk, and explain_decision methods

- Fix src/output.py: add dataclass-aware JSON serializer so RuleResult objects
  in the suspicion dict are properly serialized to the audit log file

- Create src/models.py: SQLAlchemy ORM models (User, Case, SAR, ExtractionResult,
  AuditLog, ApprovalWorkflow, CaseAttachment, SystemConfig) with indexes and
  relationships for full case lifecycle management

- Create config.py: centralised Pydantic Settings configuration with DB, API,
  JWT, LLM, RAG, rule threshold, feature flag, and CORS settings

- Update requirements.txt: add pydantic-settings, sqlalchemy, psycopg2-binary,
  python-jose, passlib, python-multipart, alembic, pytest, httpx, python-dotenv

- Create Dockerfile: Python 3.11-slim image with uvicorn API server

- Create docker-compose.yml: api + PostgreSQL + streamlit services with health
  checks and named volumes

- Create tests/__init__.py, tests/test_rules.py, tests/test_api.py:
  71 tests covering all rules, the AMLRuleEngine class, and all API endpoints

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: aml-sar-ai-system2
repository.description: AI-powered system that analyses suspicious financial alerts and automatically generates Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) using RAG and LLMs.

commit.message:
Add GitHub Actions PR validation workflow (#2233)

* Add research and refactoring plan for win32metadata reinvestment

Add structured planning documents covering five workstreams:
1. Fix PR validation gates
2. Add regression testing
3. Fix WinmdGenerator MSBuild compatibility
4. Version-aligned packaging
5. Shift-left metadata definition

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add GitHub Actions PR validation workflow

Add a GitHub Actions workflow that mirrors the Azure Pipelines CI
pipeline, ensuring PR checks run reliably on every pull request.

Pipeline structure:
- 3 parallel scrape jobs via matrix strategy (x64, x86, arm64)
- 1 build/test/package job that assembles the winmd and runs the
  full test suite including CompareBinToLastRelease validation

Excludes code signing and NuGet push (CI-only concerns).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix global search bar hidden behind sidebar when expanded

The expanded state used left: -400px to stretch leftward, but graph-area has
overflow: hidden so that portion was clipped, making the bar appear hidden.
Fixed by anchoring to left: 12px (stays within graph-area regardless of
sidebar width) and right: 190px (leaves room for the modules panel).

Also added margin-right: 8px to the collapsed magnifier so it sits with a
small breathing gap from the modules panel rather than snug against it.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove record count badges from table view

The (5), (1), (2) counts on each table name label were not adding useful
information given the records are immediately visible below. Removing them
reduces visual noise and makes the label column more compact.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add 'Hide all terminal tables' persisted checkbox to depth panel

Adds a checkbox under the depth sliders that hides all terminal tables from
both the graph view and the table view. State is persisted like any other
user setting. Graph uses a new Simulation.setHiddenTableNames() filter that
is non-destructive (same approach as setDisplayDepth). Table view filters
them out of the rendered list.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Make eye (hide table) icon always visible, repositioned to bottom-right

Previously opacity:0, only appearing on full label hover in an unpredictable
spot. Now always visible at 45% opacity in the bottom-right corner of the
table label, brightening on direct hover.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix autocomplete dropdown clipping in Visibility Settings

The table-list-section had overflow-y:auto which clipped the absolutely-
positioned autocomplete dropdown. Moved overflow/scroll to the .table-list
child only, so the dropdown can render outside the scroll boundary.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve selected row highlight visibility in table view

- Increase accent-selection opacity from 15% to 30% (was nearly invisible on dark bg)
- Add inset left border (box-shadow) to row-selected for a clear visual indicator

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

translate: update pt-br/photography.md gallery

- Add new photo #29231673 at gallery start
- Update all alt texts to numeric photo ID format (#XXXXXXX)
- Remove photos #28292145 and #28289537
- Add photo #28302088

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Detect Cloudflare challenge pages and combine photo detail fetches

- is_valid_lomography_response now rejects pages with CF challenge
  markers (Just a moment, cf_chl_opt, etc.) so curl failures fall
  through to cloudscraper which can solve the challenges.
- Combine fetch_photo_cdn_url + fetch_photo_title into a single
  fetch_photo_details call, halving the number of requests per photo.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Validate photo IDs in response before accepting fetch result

The Cloudflare challenge page on GH Actions contains lomography.com
references, so generic content validation passes. Instead, validate at
the parsing level: only accept a fetch if we actually find photo IDs in
the response. Both curl and cloudscraper are now tried on each attempt,
with retries and exponential backoff.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Lomography workflow failing silently on Cloudflare blocks

- Add content validation (is_valid_lomography_response) to detect when
  curl/cloudscraper returns a Cloudflare challenge page instead of real
  Lomography content. Previously the >1000 byte check passed for
  challenge pages, skipping the cloudscraper fallback entirely.
- When 0 photos are found from the profile page, exit with error code 1
  instead of silently reporting no new photos. This makes the workflow
  fail visibly so the issue is noticed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Reimplement mobile UI fixes from copilot/fix-mobile-ui-issues (#60)

* Initial plan

* Reimplement all changes from copilot/fix-mobile-ui-issues (PR #59)

Auto-break existing alliances and block new
proposals when alive player count drops to 2,
preventing stalemate situations.

style(ui): add emojis to fortify and reinforce log entries

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): rebuild AI rows when toggling spectator mode

In spectator mode, player 1 becomes AI-controlled,
so the setup needs playerCount rows instead of
playerCount-1. Now toggling spectator rebuilds
AI rows with correct count and player colors.

fix(ui): fix slider drag, gear visibility, row spacing

Slider handle graphics were added to the scene
instead of the container, surviving container
destruction. Also changed drag listener from

commit.message:
test(game): add fuzz tests with randomized configs

50 random full-game simulations with varying player
count (2-6), map shape, grid type, fog of war,
power-ups, alliances, and personality mixes including
custom configs. Plus 7 edge case tests. Seeds printed
on failure for reproducibility.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ai): add custom AI personality builder

Add ability to create custom AI personalities with adjustable parameters:
- Min Advantage slider (-2 to +4)
- Max Attacks slider (1 to 10, or unlimited)
- Connectivity Bonus slider (0 to 5)

Includes named preset save/load/delete via localStorage, popup editor
in SetupScene, and full integration with GameScene player creation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): change Charge power-up from flat +3 bonus to +2 extra dice

Charge now adds 2 extra dice to the attacker's roll instead of a flat +3
to the total. This lets territories with 8 dice roll 10 dice on attack,
making Charge meaningfully powerful at high dice counts.

- Rename POWER_UP_BONUS to CHARGE_EXTRA_DICE (2) and SHIELD_DEFENSE_BONUS (3)
- Roll extra dice before summing instead of adding to total after
- Update AI advantage calculation to use +2 for charge
- Shield remains as flat +3 defender bonus (passive defense)
- Add new tests for extra dice rolling and power-up consumption
- Update GAME_LOGIC.md documentation
- Replace simulation seed 123 (stalemates under new balance)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: mark phase-11 defect ticket as done

All 8 bugs fixed: seed degeneration, self-alliance,
duplicate elimination, dead alliance cleanup,
graph perf, surrender awareness, underdog logic,
undo alliance state. Plus undo config feature.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): make undo configurable in game setup

Gate undo functionality on undoEnabled config:
- Skip snapshot creation when undo is disabled
- Hide undo button and ignore Z key when disabled
- Remove undo shortcut from help overlay when disabled
- Add tests for undoEnabled persistence and validation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(game): AI surrender considers power-ups and alliances

hasPositiveAdvantageAttack() now accounts for charge power-up (+2
effective attack dice) and filters out allied targets that the AI
personality would not attack. This prevents premature surrender when
the AI has meaningful tactical options via power-ups or when alliance
restrictions falsely suggest no valid targets exist.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(game): prevent duplicate elimination events on human attacks

Capture alive players before executeAttack() and only fire elimination
events for players who were alive before but are now dead. This matches
the pattern already used in AI turn processing and prevents corrupted
achievement tracking (triple_kill, first_blood).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: rename project from xFlow to CortexLink

- All /xflow:* commands → /cortexlink:*
- Plugin slug: xflow → cortexlink
- Updated README, CHANGELOG, all skill and command files
- Bump version to 0.5.5

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: make current_apy time-weighted

- Store activation_timestamp when transitioning vault to Active state
- Calculate APY using formula: (yield / assets) * (seconds_per_year / elapsed_seconds) * 10000
- Handle edge cases: zero elapsed time, zero assets, zero yield
- Use checked arithmetic to prevent overflow on intermediate values

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Address PR #178 review feedback

- Add LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER config flag (independent of USE_LLM) so report
  generation is opt-in rather than an implicit side-effect of enabling LLMs
- Add --llm-report CLI flag wired to LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER
- Gate LLMReporter.generate() on USE_LLM AND LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER
- Gate fuzzer.py LLMReporter call behind config.LLM_ENABLE_REPORTER check
- Add _MAX_FINDINGS_IN_REPORT (50) and _MAX_SUMMARY_CHARS (1500) caps to
  prevent context-limit issues on large runs
- Fix _extract_json_from_text to validate isinstance(parsed, dict) and raise
  ValueError for non-object JSON (list/bool/etc.) so retry loop can correct it
- Add unit tests for LLMReporter: disabled flags, no detections, success path,
  LLM failure handling, truncation, and findings cap (10 new tests)
- Update README --help block and --use-llm description to reflect broader
  LLM scope (inference + endpoint classification + IDOR chain classification)
- Clarify USE_LLM comment in config.py to list all LLM-driven features

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix connection leak: use finally blocks to always close DB connections

Every database function now follows the pattern:
- conn = None before try:
- conn = get_connection() as first line inside try:
- all conn.close() calls inside try: removed
- finally: block added to ensure conn.close() is always called

This prevents connection leaks when exceptions occur between
acquiring and closing the connection.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Internal helper to check if an address is blacklisted and
